status: height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 28px 0 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary); z-index: 6;
scroll-body: flex: 1; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
hero-art: position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(120% 100% at 50% 20%, #243B55 0%, #141E30 50%, #060A12 100%);
hero-fade: position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(6,10,18,0) 40%, rgba(0,0,0,0.65) 72%, rgba(0,0,0,0.92) 100%);
hero-content: position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 16px; padding: 0 18px;
hero-brand: font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.2px; color: var(--text-secondary); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
hero-play: background: #fff; color: #000; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; padding: 12px 30px; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; border: none;
hero-add: width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(120,120,128,0.36); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: none; backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
rail-head: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 18px 10px;
upnext-row: display: flex; gap: 12px; padding: 0 18px 4px; overflow-x: auto; scrollbar-width: none;
unx-art: width: 196px; height: 112px; border-radius: 10px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
unx-prog: position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; height: 4px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.28);
unx-tvp: position: absolute; top: 8px; left: 8px; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.4px; color: #fff; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); padding: 3px 6px; border-radius: 5px; backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; color: var(--text-tertiary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; gap: 3px; letter-spacing: 0.1px;
